subject: Your Saudi contact
body:
Can you give me the name of your  Saudi contact  I will get my friend the the uae ambassador to Saudi to arrange a meetings with him I will not mention your name to him at the moment 
During my meeting I will only meet him casually and invite him to meet me in dubai to discuss mutual issues
 I will let you know if he accepts 
If our dubai  meeting goes well I will mention that you are one of my friends I will brief you on the outcome 

Sent from my iPhone
NOTE: This e-mail message is subject to the Dubai World Group disclaimer see http://www.dubaiworld.ae/email_disclaimer
body_html:
Can you give me the name of your Saudi contact I will get my friend the the uae ambassador to Saudi to arrange a meetings with him I will not mention your name to him at the moment
During my meeting I will only meet him casually and invite him to meet me in dubai to discuss mutual issues

If our dubai meeting goes well I will mention that you are one of my friends I will brief you on the outcome
